description: Express shuttle to the red planet's premier settlement. Complimentary dust-storm viewing on the upper observation deck. Warning: gravity 38% of Earth — your carry-on will feel suspiciously light.
Cruise through Saturn's rings before docking at Titan's methane-lake resort. Onboard entertainment includes zero-G karaoke and a surprisingly good ramen bar.
Sub-ice ocean excursion on Jupiter's most mysterious moon. Bring your own towel — the hotel claims they provide them but they never do.
Short hop to Earth's favourite neighbour. Perfect weekend getaway — low gravity golf, crater hiking, and the legendary Tranquility Base gift shop.
